name: reharm
description: re:Harmoniz — an evolution loop for research wikis. Knowledge nodes (claims) harden generation by generation under mutation (revision) and natural selection (adversarial verification). Ships 6 skills: root (scaffold + atomic seeding), reharmonization (5-phase evolution session), modal-interchange (cross-scope mashup), critique (user adjudication of ambiguous nodes), pushing (read-only next-step advisor), experiment-design (field-experiment pre-registration). Also ships an opt-in autonomous loop template (templates/loop.md) that drives these skills unattended via the native /loop command. Self-contained: web search uses native tools; frontier scoring and wiki lint ship as stdlib scripts.
